name: Tiger GitHub MCP Server (Timescale)
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Timescale (timescale org) — part of their Tiger AI tooling suite — for GitHub. Enables AI agents to interact with GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, and workflows through GitHub's GraphQL API. Designed for AI-powered developer workflows where agents assist with code review, issue triage, and repository management.
use_cases: Querying and managing GitHub issues from engineering workflow agents
Reviewing pull requests and analyzing code changes from code review agents
Triaging repository issues and labeling from automation agents
Integrating GitHub data into AI-driven development workflow pipelines
not_for: Teams already using GitHub's official MCP server (github-mcp-server)
GitLab, Bitbucket, or non-GitHub repository management
Organizations not using AI-native developer workflow patterns
best_when: An engineering team using GitHub wants AI agents to assist with issue management, PR review, and repository operations — Timescale's Tiger implementation is optimized for AI development workflows.
avoid_when: GitHub's official MCP server covers your needs. Tiger GitHub MCP is an alternative with Timescale's opinionated AI-workflow design — evaluate both before choosing.

auth.notes: GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) or GitHub App token required. Standard GitHub API authentication.

pricing.free_tier_limits: GitHub API is free with rate limits
pricing.paid_tiers: GitHub plans affect API rate limits
pricing.notes: GitHub API is free. MCP server is free open source from Timescale.

known_agent_gotchas: Official from Timescale — high quality implementation designed for AI workflows
Scope PAT token to minimum required GitHub permissions — avoid admin scopes
PR comments and issue responses are visible to all collaborators — test carefully
Consider GitHub's official MCP server (github/github-mcp-server) as well-maintained alternative
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to GitHub API. PAT or App token authentication. Repository code and issues may contain sensitive data. Use minimal PAT scopes. GitHub SOC2 certified.

security_score_components.security_notes: Official Timescale implementation. GitHub SOC2. Minimal PAT scopes recommended. Repository data may be sensitive.
